rows.relation: optimized replay verifier (skip embedded-proof reverify, binary canonical commitments) over a proof-checked source chain
rows.note: carry-aware experimental backend over the checked 4x4 decoding layout; the optimized replay verifier skips per-step embedded proof re-verification (the typed boundary verifier does the same) and uses binary canonical commitments over fixed-size cryptographic identities and the raw stark-proof byte buffer instead of JSON-serialize-then-hash; engineering-only red-team measurement, issue #290
